title: kube: add DaemonSet support for generate
body:
Complements https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19371

```release-note
Add support to generate k8s DaemonSet kind with podman kube generate.
```

Signed-off-by: danishprakash <danish.prakash@suse.com>

comments.body: Does this need to update https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/kubernetes_support.md as well?

> Does this need to update [`main`/docs/kubernetes_support.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/kubernetes_support.md?rgh-link-date=2023-08-17T10%3A00%3A48Z) as well?

You're right, I believe it does. I'll go through the entire repo once to see If I'm not missing any more documentation, thanks!
